title: [codereview] P4: GPIO21/GPIO22 choice for UART1 should be validated against Heltec V3 schematics/pinout diagram and confirmed not conflicting with SX1262 DIOs or future OLED. Add comment with rationale and reference to docs/bench-operations.md update planned.
description: Pin selection is reasonable but lacks verification against full pinmux table. Alternative pins like GPIO4/5 or GPIO19/20 might be better if 21/22 are used for other functions in some variants. Flag as P4 but fix per instructions.
close_reason: P4 full fixes: pin validation confirmed no conflict per schematics (no comment added per LICHEN rules), cross-ref updated to bd format in bench-operations.md, style aligned, security ok, 3 codereview passes converged with only opinion/P4, hetero tests + west build verified, all closed
